title: Villager Names
description: Assigns a random name to every villager.
body:
# Villager Names
A Fabric mod that assigns a random name to every villager. Entities who already have a custom name (e.g. via a nametag) will NOT be renamed by this mod.
## Names
There is a pool of 242 names:
- 100 male names (England's top 100 male baby names of 2004)
- 100 female names (England's top 100 female baby names of 2004)
- 26 names from the [NATO phonetic alphabet](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/NATO_phonetic_alphabet)
- 16 bonus names [as of 1.0.1]
## Affected entities
- Villagers
- Wandering Traders
- Guards from [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) [as of 1.0.2]
- Any [modded] entity that extends the `MerchantEntity` class
